examples.title: Employee management package

examples.title: Query employee details
examples.description: Procedure with IN and OUT parameters that returns an employee name and salary.
examples.content:
create or replace PROCEDURE query_emp
 (id     IN  angajati.id_angajat%TYPE,
  name   OUT angajati.nume%TYPE,
  salary OUT angajati.salariul%TYPE) IS
BEGIN
  SELECT   nume, salariul INTO name, salary    FROM    angajati
   WHERE   id_angajat = id;
END query_emp;
/

examples.title: Protect customer credit limits
examples.description: Row-level trigger that prevents lowering a customer credit limit below the allowed value.
examples.content:
--Realizati un trigger pe tabela CLIENTI care sa nu permita diminuarea limitei de credit sub 10.

create or replace trigger T_limita_credit_clienti
before update of limita_credit on clienti
for each row
when (new.limita_credit<10)
begin
raise_application_error (-20200, 'Nu puteti diminua limita de credit!');
end;
/

-- TESTARE
select * from clienti
where id_client=478;

update clienti
set limita_credit=5 where id_client=478;

examples.title: Update an order view
examples.description: INSTEAD OF trigger that translates updates on a view into updates on the underlying order rows.
examples.content:
--Trigger pe tabele virtuale:
--Tabela virtuala V_TOTAL_COMENZI va contine id_client, nr_comanda, data, id_produs si valoarea acestuia.

--Pas 1: Crearea tabelei virtuale V_TOTAL_COMENZI
create or replace view v_total_comenzi
as select c.id_client, c.id_comanda, c.data, r.id_produs, r.cantitate*r.pret as valoare
from comenzi c, rand_comenzi r
where r.id_comanda=c.id_comanda;


--Pas 2: Realizarea triggerului care actualizeaza pretul produselor de pe o anumita comanda in cazul in care se actualizeaza valoarea comandata.

create or replace trigger t_v_total_comenzi
instead of update on v_total_comenzi
for each row
begin
update rand_comenzi
set pret=:new.valoare/cantitate
where id_comanda=:new.id_comanda
and id_produs=:new.id_produs;
end;
/

-- Pas 3: TESTARE

select * from v_total_comenzi where id_comanda=2458;

--preturi inainte de update
select * from rand_comenzi where id_comanda=2458; 

update v_total_comenzi
set valoare=valoare*1.2
where id_comanda=2458;

--preturi dupa update
select * from rand_comenzi where id_comanda=2458; 
rollback;
